basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Project Research Scientist-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Project Research Scientist-II (NM) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website actrec.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ACTREC Project Research Scientist-II (NM) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate/Master’s degree in mathematics, statistics, physics, electronic engineering, computer science or IT, Ph.D. in mathematics, statistics, physics, electronic engineering, computer science or IT or bioinformatics/computational biology
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-II (NM): First Class /CGPA 7 or higher on a 10-point scale in Post-Graduate/Master’s degree in mathematics, statistics, physics, electronic engineering, computer science or IT, with 3 years post qualification experience with Python and DL framework (Pytorch preferred) or with 3 years post qualification experience in bioinformatics/computational biology or Ph.D. in mathematics, statistics, physics, electronic engineering, computer science or IT with hands-on experience with Python and DL framework (Pytorch preferred) or Ph.D. in bioinformatics/computational biology with hands-on experience in whole genome transcriptome sequencing.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ACTREC Project Research Scientist-II (NM) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACTREC Project Research Scientist-II (NM) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-II (NM) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Research Scientist-II (NM) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post-Graduate/Master’s degree or a Ph.D. in relevant fields like mathematics, statistics, physics, electronic engineering, computer science, IT, or bioinformatics/computational biology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-II (NM) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-II (NM) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 87100 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist-II (NM) position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where is ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for the Project Research Scientist-II (NM) post?
faq.answer: For Master's degree holders, 3 years of post-qualification experience with Python and DL frameworks or in bioinformatics/computational biology is required. For Ph.D. holders, hands-on experience with Python and DL frameworks or in whole genome transcriptome sequencing is necessary.
